name: Vault Minerals Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.9900, stop A$3.6333, target A$5.7153 (0.53:1) — then trail it.
